post.summary: New - Import approved Android Enterprise apps to AirWatch
post.description: * Imports all the approved apps in admin Google account of the organization to AirWatch. This makes them available to be managed by AirWatch. Imported apps can be assigned to the smart groups to be made available to the users in the organization.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the organization group(Required)

412.description: {7501: Android Enterprise is not enabled for this Organization Group}

patch.summary: New - Approve an app on admin Google account for the organization
patch.description: * Approves the input application on admin Google account for given organization group. This has the same effect of logging into Google Work PlayStore and approving a selected application for the organization. This does not add that application automatically to AirWatch. Call to 'import' API is needed for the same.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the organization group(Required)

get.summary: Returns removal log events for an internal application, filtered by the App bundle identifier of the application and organization group.
get.description:
Search and retrieve removal logs for internal applications.
            If the number of remove application commands queued in a set time interval is exceeded the commands are put in locked state
            The API method returns the details of the commands that are put in locked state
            The records returned take into consideration the filter criteria received in request query.

parameters.name: bundleid
parameters.description: BundleId/PackageId.Example = "com.test.testapp".

parameters.name: organizationgroupid
parameters.description: OrganizationGroup Identifier. Example = "890".

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The AppRemoval Log Threshold Status.Example = "3".

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number.Example = "2".

parameters.name: pagesize
parameters.description: Records per page.Example = "10".

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Orderby column name.Example = "ThresholdId".

put.summary: Sets the action (unlock or clear) executed after the threshold for the Removal Log events is reached.
put.description:
Updates the action taken on the threshold.
            Either unlock/clear the threshold.
            On unlock the commands are sent to the device
            On clear the commands are purged from the queue.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The body of the request.

parameters.name: organizationgroupid
parameters.description: LocationGroup Identifier.

400.description: Bad Request 1.{3052: Threshold not found or user does not have access to it.}, 2.{3052: Threshold not reached held state.}

get.summary: New - Gets list of devices that have the specified internal or public application installed or assigned.
get.description: This endpoint provides a list of devices that have the specified internal or public application installed or assigned at the version level. A list of all the assigned devices is returned by default.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description:
The uuid of the application. 
            Accepted formats **guid**
            E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number which will be fetched, 0 based index. Default 0.

parameters.name: organizationgroupuuid
parameters.description: The Organization Group identifier in which the counts need to be fetched. Will be defaulted to admin organization group identifier if not set. E.g. EF331D65-C005-4388-8E52-B1390AA171D9

parameters.name: pagesize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to be returned in one page. Default 500.

parameters.name: searchtext
parameters.description: If provided, the records matching this text will be returned. The search will be applied on the following properties [name, installed_version, assigned_version]. The default value will be empty string.

parameters.name: sortorder
parameters.description: Whether the sort order is ascending or descending. The property used for sorting is name. Possible values [Asc, Desc]. Default value is Asc.

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Name of the property used for sorting

parameters.name: smartgroupids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of smart group ids to which the devices belong. If no smart group id is passed, all the eligible devices will be returned based on the other filters. E.g. 10, 20

parameters.name: isassigned
parameters.description: If provided, the list of devices on which the app is assigned is included in the returned result set. Default false.

parameters.name: isnotassigned
parameters.description: If provided, the list of devices on which the app is sideloaded or marked for removal but not assigned is included in the returned result set. Default false.

parameters.name: isexcluded
parameters.description: If provided, the list of devices on which the app is excluded is included in the returned result set. Default false.

parameters.name: isinstalled
parameters.description: if provided, the list of devices on which the app is installed is included in the returned result set. Default false.

parameters.name: isnotinstalled
parameters.description: if provided, the list of devices on which the app is not installed but assigned is included in the returned result set. Default false.

parameters.name: installationstatus
parameters.description: Comma separated list of managed application list reasons to which the devices assigned to the app belong. If no reason is passed, all the assigned devices will be returned based on the other filters.

parameters.name: lastactiontaken
parameters.description: Comma separated list of application deployment status to which the devices assigned to the app belong. If no deployment status is passed, all the assigned devices will be returned based on the other filters.

403.description: 1. {1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: 1. {7000: Application not found.}2. {5054: Organization Group not found}

422.description: 1012 : Unprocessable Entity 1. {{Element: RequestQuery.QueryParams Message: [{"MemberNames":["organizationgroupuuid"],"ErrorMessage":"App organization group must be specified and must be a valid guid."}]}}2. {{Element: RequestQuery.QueryParams Message: [{"MemberNames":["installationstatus"],"ErrorMessage":"One or more invalid installation status values are present."}]}}3. {{Element: RequestQuery.QueryParams Message: [{"MemberNames":["lastactiontaken"],"ErrorMessage":"One or more invalid last action taken values are present."}]}}

post.summary: New - Create a new blob with attached file
post.description:
- Create a new blob with attached file
- Supported file types are 'ipa',
  'apk', 'xap', 'appx', 'msi', 'app', 'zip', 'xml', 'pem', 'exe', 'pkg',
  'dmg', 'plist', 'mpkg', 'js', 'jse', 'ps1', 'ps1xml', 'psc1', 'psd1',
  'psm1', 'pssc', 'cdxml', 'vbs', 'vbe', 'wsf', 'wsc', 'msp', 'mst',
  'p12', 'pfx', 'p7b', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'bmp', 'p7m', 'ppkg', 'cat', 'apf'
- No size restrictions
- Organization Group will be set to Global irrespective of value passed if the file type is of 'apf'

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: Name of the file being uploaded(Required)

parameters.name: organizationGroupId
parameters.description: Organization Group ID integer identifying the customer or container(Required)

parameters.name: moduleType
parameters.description: Module type of the blob. For application blobs, module type is required and should be set as Application.

parameters.name: fileLink
parameters.description: Path of the file to upload. Required if blob file is not submitted

parameters.name: accessVia
parameters.description: Access type. If EIS, content gateway ID is required and validated for the Organization Group Id

parameters.name: contentGatewayId
parameters.description: Content gateway ID of the repository to save to. Required if accessVia is EIS.

parameters.name: downloadfilefromlink
parameters.description: Set to true if application needs to be downloaded from the link.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: required when accessVia is EIS and downloadfilefromlink is true

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: required when accessVia is EIS and downloadfilefromlink is true

400.description: 1.{7019: File is not attached} 2.{400: Invalid blob type provided} 3.{400: Invalid Module type.} 4.{7014: UploadViaLink should have handler http(s) or content gateway should be selected} 5.{7605: Unable to download the file from the link. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 6.{7606: Unable to fetch the file size for the link. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 7.{6: FileName vannot be null.} 8.{8175: File hash is required while upload via link and download file from link is disabled.} 9.{8176: The provided file hash is not valid.}

422.description: 1.{7021: External repository credentials are invalid} 2.{7601: File storage is disabled at current organization group}  3.{7602: Uploading file exceeds database file size limit set at current organization group}  4.{7603: Uploading file exceeds maximum file size limit set at current organization group}  5.{7604: Uploading file exceeds maximum storage limit set at current organization group}

post.summary: New - upload the chunks.
post.description:
- Create a chunk at the specified path
- Supported file types are 'ipa',
 'apk', 'xap', 'appx', 'msi', 'app', 'zip', 'xml', 'pem', 'exe', 'pkg',
 'dmg', 'plist', 'mpkg', 'js', 'jse', 'ps1', 'ps1xml', 'psc1', 'psd1',
 'psm1', 'pssc', 'cdxml', 'vbs', 'vbe', 'wsf', 'wsc', 'msp', 'mst',
 'p12', 'pfx', 'p7b', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'bmp', 'p7m', 'ppkg', 'cat', 'apf'.
- For Targeted System Update (module_type=TargetedSystemUpdate), supported file types are 'msu', 'cab'.

parameters.name: chunk_sequence_number
parameters.description: chunk sequence number being uploaded.(Required)

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description: UUID of the chunk file being uploaded.

parameters.name: total_blob_size
parameters.description: total blob size to be uploaded.(Required)

parameters.name: chunk_size
parameters.description: total chunk size to be uploaded.(Required)

parameters.name: module_type
parameters.description: Optional. When omitted, uploads are treated as General module. When provided, must match one of the supported module types (e.g. TargetedSystemUpdate).

post.summary: Creates an internal application.
post.description:
1. Creates an internal application using the uploaded file chunks.
2. If application is added through link and downloadfilefromlink is set to true then UploadViaLink should be set to false.
3. ActualFileVersion in API is same as App version on the UI; AppVersion in API is UEM Version on the UI.
4. BundleId And ActualFileVersion Are required when the app is uploaded via link.
5. If UploadViaLink is false, TransactionId or BlobId is required.
6. Use '/internal/application' API endpoint for using 4th decimal in applications.
7. If AppVersion is not passed, it is parsed from the ActualFileVersion (0 for the decimal places it cannot parse).
8. For windows SFD apps of format exe and zip, admin can pass 'ActualFileVersion' even when UploadViaLink is False.
9. Set value of attribute ‘CarryOverAssignments’  to ‘false’ to prevent carrying over assignments from older versions to the newer one. By default it is true.

3. actual_file_version is same as App version on the UI; app_uem_Version on the API is UEM Version on the UI.
4. bundle_id and actual_file_version are required when the app is uploaded via link.
5. If upload_via_link is false, transaction_id or blob_id is required.
6. If app_uem_version is not passed, it is parsed from the actual_file_version (0 for the decimal places it cannot parse).
7. For Windows SFD apps of format exe and zip, admin can pass 'actual_file_version' even when upload_via_link is False.
8. Set value of attribute ‘CarryOverAssignments’  to ‘false’ to prevent carrying over assignments from older versions to the newer one. By default it is true.
